Title: Three
Speaker: {op}
TextLines: {op} stands at the railing, lighter open, cigarette unlit.
"That's three, now. The last one had a kid's drawing on his desk."
The wind takes the lighter flame before it catches.

Choices.Label: "You did the job. That's what we pay for."
"You want a bonus or a transfer?"

Title: Performance Review
Speaker: {op}
TextLines: {op}'s file is open on the table. Seven entries. The last three don't even have names.
"You don't ask anymore," the Director observes. "You used to ask."
{op} doesn't look up from the coffee.

Title: Empty
Speaker: {op}
TextLines: {op} hasn't answered the comm in two days.
When you arrive the apartment is empty of personality — no photos, no books, no signs of life.
{op} is sitting on the floor against the wall, looking at the door.

Choices.Label: Tell them tomorrow's mission needs them.

Title: Late Edition
Speaker: Director
TextLines: The Quill ran the story at 4 AM. Front-of-feed by 6.
"There's a name attached," the Director says. "Not yours yet."
She turns the monitor toward you. The face is the contractor your team buried two cycles ago.

Title: Welcome to the Floor
Speaker: Director
Setting: Operations bullpen, glass walls, no one sitting still
TextLines: "You've read the file. You know what we do."
"What you don't know yet is what it does to the people you send."
"Try not to find out the hard way."

Title: Loyalty Audit
Speaker: {op}
Setting: Off-site coffee shop, twenty blocks from any office
TextLines: {op} chose the meeting place. That alone tells you something.
"I want a transfer," {op} says. "Or a contract review. Pick one."

Title: External Pressure
Speaker: Director
TextLines: "The Razor is moving on us. Open file. Public."
The Director's voice is even, but her hands are flat on the table — she's keeping them still.
"Whatever you have planned this cycle, halve it."
